---
name: Bug report
about: Something broken or unexpected
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS + browser (e.g. macOS 15, Chrome 131):
- Deployed site or local dev:
- Commit or version (if local):

## Screenshots / logs

Add screenshots, console errors, or network logs if relevant. Paste
tracebacks in a code block.

## Is AI involved?

- [ ] Yes — which provider (Anthropic / OpenAI / Google / Ollama)?
- [ ] No — this is about the timeline, discovery, graph, or another
      non-AI feature.
